ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for billing */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address for billing purposes */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the billing address record */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company if the customer is a business */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES billing_addresses ("billing_address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing_addresses" (
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer associated with the billing address */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the billing address contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the billing address contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the billing address contact person */,
  "street1" TEXT /* Street address and billing address number */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the billing address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the billing address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the billing address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip or postal code of the billing address */,
  "street2" TEXT /* Additional street information */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the billing address record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the billing address record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the billing address used for the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping address used for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES billing_addresses ("billing_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES billing_addresses ("billing_address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer_service, manager, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that is being validated */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule (e.g., Regex for phone numbers) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the validation context */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates if the validation rule is mandatory */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message to be displayed if the validation fails */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "total_customers" INTEGER /* Total number of customers recorded */,
  "total_orders" INTEGER /* Total number of orders placed */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from the orders */,
  "average_order_value" REAL /* Average value of orders */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
